function.message: Handled the next inbox item: OCR-structured all bills related to Ida Novak by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter (while preserving original body text) to three purchase records, then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read/context), loaded relevant workflow and schema docs before task work, preserved original record bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item after full completion per inbox workflow.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR all bills related to Ida Novak. A search in 50_finance/purchases found exactly three files containing related_entity Ida Novak, and each was read and migrated to the required bill frontmatter shape from finance-record-frontmatter.md with line items extracted from visible note content. After completing all requested edits, 00_inbox/000_next-task.md was deleted per process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
